prerequisites.value: Cha 15, Improved Lay on Hands, lay on hands class feature.

description.value:
**Benefit:** As a full-round action, you can use your lay on hands ability to heal a creature within 20 feet. This does not allow you to harm undead at a distance with your lay on hands ability.

**Normal:** You must be able to touch a creature to use the lay on hands ability.
